docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,960.00 FILED BY COLE LOUANNE C PHD AS TO DEFENDANT STATE BOARD OF CONTROL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
